ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NFL team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NFL team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the NFL team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the NFL team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-specific defensive statistic entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defensive statistic entry */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "points_allowed_game" INTEGER /* Points allowed in the game */,
  "total_yards_allowed_game" INTEGER /* Total yards allowed in the game */,
  "offensive_plays_allowed_game" INTEGER /* Offensive plays allowed in the game */,
  "yards_per_play_game" REAL /* Yards per play in the game */,
  "turnovers_game" INTEGER /* Turnovers in the game */,
  "forced_fumbles_game" INTEGER /* Forced fumbles in the game */,
  "total_first_downs_allowed_game" INTEGER /* Total first downs allowed in the game */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win or loss status of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the defensive statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defensive statistic entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the defensive statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the defensive statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy football league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy football league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the commissioner of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fantasy football league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fantasy football league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of fantasy league (e.g., head-to-head, rotisserie, etc.) */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the fantasy league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_leagues_commissioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("commissioner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy football team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy football league */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy football team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the owner of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the fantasy football team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the fantasy football team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the fantasy football team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the fantasy football team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_players" (
  "fantasy_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy football player */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy football team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NFL team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* Image of the player */,
  "player_position_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player by position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_players_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the scout is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of scouting experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES fantasy_players ("fantasy_player_id")
)
